      function hideTypingIndicator() {
        const typingIndicator = document.getElementById("typingIndicator");
        if (typingIndicator) {
          typingIndicator.remove();
        }
      }

      function setLoading(loading) {
        isLoading = loading;
        const sendBtnIcon = elements.sendBtn.querySelector("i");

        if (loading) {
          elements.sendBtn.innerHTML = "";
          const stopIcon = document.createElement("i");
          stopIcon.setAttribute("data-lucide", "square");
          stopIcon.style.fill = "white";
          elements.sendBtn.appendChild(stopIcon);
          elements.sendBtn.style.backgroundColor = "var(--text-secondary)";
          elements.sendBtn.title = "Parar Geração";
        } else {
          elements.sendBtn.innerHTML = '<i data-lucide="send"></i>';
          elements.sendBtn.style.backgroundColor = "";
          elements.sendBtn.title = "Enviar";
        }
        lucide.createIcons();

        elements.loading.classList.toggle("show", loading);

        const interactiveElements = [
          elements.messageInput,
          elements.resetRagBtn,
          elements.attachBtn,
          elements.fileInput,
        ];

        interactiveElements.forEach((el) => {
          if (el) el.disabled = loading;
        });

        if (pendingAction === "resetProcessing") {
          if (loading && elements.resetRagBtn) {
            elements.resetRagBtn.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="loader-2" class="animate-spin" style="width:12px; height:12px;"></i><span>Resetando...</span>`;
          } else if (!loading && elements.resetRagBtn) {
            elements.resetRagBtn.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="database-backup" style="width:12px; height:12px;"></i><span>Resetar</span>`;
            pendingAction = null;
          }
          lucide.createIcons();
        }

        document.body.style.cursor = loading ? "wait" : "default";
      }

      function setStatus(message, type = "") {
        elements.statusMessage.textContent = message;
        elements.statusMessage.style.color =
          type === "error"
            ? "#d32f2f"
            : type === "success"
              ? "#388e3c"
              : "#7A1818";
        setTimeout(() => (elements.statusMessage.textContent = ""), 3000);
      }
      let pendingAction = null; // 'delete' or 'reset'

      let sessionToDeleteId = null;

      function showConfirmModal(type, sessionId = null) {
        const titleEl = elements.confirmModal.querySelector(".confirm-title");
        const textEl = elements.confirmModal.querySelector(".confirm-text");
        const confirmBtn = elements.confirmDeleteBtn;

        if (type === "delete") {
          pendingAction = "delete";
          sessionToDeleteId = sessionId;
          titleEl.textContent = "Excluir conversa";
          textEl.textContent =
            "Tem certeza que deseja excluir esta conversa permanentemente? Esta ação não pode ser desfeita.";
          confirmBtn.textContent = "Excluir";
          confirmBtn.style.background = "var(--color-primary)";
        } else if (type === "reset") {
          pendingAction = "reset";
          titleEl.textContent = "Resetar Memória RAG";
          textEl.textContent =
            "Tem certeza que deseja limpar e recriar o banco de dados vetorial? Isso apagará o conhecimento atual.";
          confirmBtn.textContent = "Resetar";
          confirmBtn.style.background = "#d32f2f"; // Warning color
        }

        elements.confirmModal.style.display = "flex";
      }

      function hideDeleteModal() {
        pendingAction = null;
        sessionToDeleteId = null;
        elements.confirmModal.style.display = "none";
      }

      elements.cancelDeleteBtn.addEventListener("click", hideDeleteModal);

      elements.confirmDeleteBtn.addEventListener("click", async () => {
        if (pendingAction === "delete" && sessionToDeleteId) {
          const originalText = elements.confirmDeleteBtn.textContent;
          elements.confirmDeleteBtn.textContent = "Excluindo...";
          elements.confirmDeleteBtn.disabled = true;

          try {
            const success = await deleteSession(sessionToDeleteId);
            if (success) {
              sessions = await fetchSessions();

              if (currentSessionId === sessionToDeleteId) {
                if (sessions.length > 0) {
                  renderSessionList(); // Update list first
                  loadSession(sessions[0].session_id);
                } else {
                  startNewChat();
                }
              } else {
                renderSessionList();
              }
            } else {
              setStatus("Erro ao excluir conversa.", "error");
            }
          } catch (e) {
            setStatus("Erro inesperado ao excluir.", "error");
          } finally {
            hideDeleteModal();
            elements.confirmDeleteBtn.textContent = originalText;
            elements.confirmDeleteBtn.disabled = false;
          }
        } else if (pendingAction === "reset") {
          hideDeleteModal();

          pendingAction = "resetProcessing";

          setLoading(true);
          setStatus("Reiniciando base de conhecimento...", "warning");

          const result = await resetRagDatabase();

          setLoading(false); // Restore UI

          if (result && result.status === "success") {
            setStatus(
              result.message || "Memória RAG resetada com sucesso!",
              "success",
            );

            sessions = await fetchSessions(); // Update sidebar (likely clear it)
            renderSessionList();
            startNewChat(); // Clear current view
          } else {
            setStatus("Erro ao resetar memória RAG.", "error");
          }
        }
      });

      async function handleDeleteSession(sessionId, event) {
        event.stopPropagation();
        showConfirmModal("delete", sessionId);
      }

      if (elements.resetRagBtn) {
        elements.resetRagBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
          showConfirmModal("reset");
        });
      }
      async function loadSession(sessionId) {
        hideUsersPage();
        if (typeof hideRagDocsPage === "function") hideRagDocsPage();
        if (typeof hideCategoriesPage === "function") hideCategoriesPage();
        if (typeof hideTeamsPage === "function") hideTeamsPage();

        if (currentSessionId !== sessionId) {
          sessions = sessions.filter((s) => !s._isTemp);
          renderSessionList();
        }

        currentSessionId = sessionId;
        clearChatArea();
        showSkeletonMessages();
        const history = await fetchHistory(sessionId);
        clearChatArea(); // Shows empty state by default

        if (history && history.length > 0) {
          hideEmptyState(); // Hide if we have content
          history.forEach((message) => renderMessage(message));
        } else {
          showEmptyState(); // Explicit show if empty
        }

        renderSessionList();
        elements.messageInput.focus();
      }
      function startNewChat() {
        hideUsersPage();
        if (typeof hideRagDocsPage === "function") hideRagDocsPage();
        if (typeof hideCategoriesPage === "function") hideCategoriesPage();
        if (typeof hideTeamsPage === "function") hideTeamsPage();

        // If a stream is running, abort it first
        if (isLoading) {
          if (abortController) {
            abortController.abort();
            abortController = null;
          }
          if (uploadAbortController) {
            uploadAbortController.abort();
            uploadAbortController = null;
          }
          hideTypingIndicator();
          setLoading(false);
        }

        sessions = sessions.filter((s) => !s._isTemp);

        currentSessionId = generateUUID();
        clearChatArea();

        const tempSession = {
          session_id: currentSessionId,
          titulo: "Nova conversa",
          data_inicio: new Date().toISOString(),
          _isTemp: true, // Helper flag
        };
        sessions.unshift(tempSession);

        renderSessionList();
        elements.messageInput.focus();
        setStatus("Nova conversa iniciada", "success");
      }
      async function handleSendMessage(e) {
        e.preventDefault();

        if (isLoading) {
          if (abortController) {
            abortController.abort();
            abortController = null;
            setStatus("Geração interrompida.", "warning");
            hideTypingIndicator();
            setLoading(false);
          }
          if (uploadAbortController) {
            uploadAbortController.abort();
            uploadAbortController = null;
            setStatus("Upload cancelado.", "warning");
            hideTypingIndicator();
            setLoading(false);
          }
          return;
        }

        const message = elements.messageInput.value.trim();
        if (!message) return;

        if (isEditing) {
          const editingId = elements.inputForm.dataset.editingId;
          if (editingId) {
            pruneHistoryFrom(editingId);
            cancelEdit();
          }
        }

        renderMessage({ role: "user", content: message });
        elements.messageInput.value = "";
        elements.messageInput.style.height = "auto";

        setLoading(true);

        showTypingIndicator();

        let messageDiv = null;
        let contentDiv = null;

        const response = await sendMessage(
          message,
          currentSessionId,
          (chunkText) => {
            if ((!chunkText || chunkText.trim() === "") && !messageDiv) return;

            if (!messageDiv) {
              hideTypingIndicator();
              messageDiv = renderMessage({ role: "assistant", content: "" });
              contentDiv = messageDiv.querySelector(".message-content");
            }
            if (contentDiv) {
              contentDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(chunkText);

              contentDiv.querySelectorAll("a").forEach((link) => {
                link.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
                link.setAttribute("rel", "noopener noreferrer");
              });

              processLeadBlocks(contentDiv);
              processInfoSections(contentDiv);
              processProductImages(contentDiv);

              elements.messagesContainer.scrollTop =
                elements.messagesContainer.scrollHeight;
            }
          },
        );

        if (!messageDiv) hideTypingIndicator();

        if (response !== "Geração cancelada.") {
          if (!messageDiv) {
            renderMessage({ role: "assistant", content: response });
          } else if (contentDiv) {
            contentDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(response);
            contentDiv.querySelectorAll("a").forEach((link) => {
              link.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
              link.setAttribute("rel", "noopener noreferrer");
            });
            processLeadBlocks(contentDiv);
            processInfoSections(contentDiv);
            processProductImages(contentDiv);
          }
        } else if (messageDiv) {
          contentDiv.innerHTML += marked.parse(
            "\n\n*Geração cancelada pelo usuário.*",
          );
        }

        setLoading(false);

        try {
          const latestHistory = await fetchHistory(currentSessionId);
          if (latestHistory && latestHistory.length > 0) {
            const domMessages = Array.from(
              elements.messagesContainer.querySelectorAll(".message"),
            );

            const lastDomMsg = domMessages[domMessages.length - 1];

            if (lastDomMsg) {
              const lastHistoryMsg = latestHistory[latestHistory.length - 1];

              if (lastHistoryMsg && !lastDomMsg.hasAttribute("data-id")) {
                lastDomMsg.setAttribute("data-id", lastHistoryMsg.id);
              }

              if (domMessages.length >= 2) {
                const userDomMsg = domMessages[domMessages.length - 2];
                const userHistoryMsg = latestHistory[latestHistory.length - 2];

                if (
                  userDomMsg &&
                  !userDomMsg.hasAttribute("data-id") &&
                  userHistoryMsg
                ) {
                  userDomMsg.setAttribute("data-id", userHistoryMsg.id);
                }
              }
            }
          }
        } catch (e) {}

        sessions = await fetchSessions();
        renderSessionList();
      }

      elements.fileInput.addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
        const file = e.target.files[0];
        if (!file) return;

        renderMessage({
          role: "user",
          content: `Enviando arquivo: ${file.name}`, // Mantém texto para histórico, mas UI oculta
          file: file.name,
        });
        setStatus(`Processando ${file.name}...`, "warning"); // Amarelo/Laranja enquanto processa
        isLoading = true;

        uploadAbortController = new AbortController();

        showTypingIndicator();
        setLoading(true); // Ativa bot?o de stop

        try {
          // Garante categorias carregadas para descobrir uma pasta Drive válida
          if (!allCategories || allCategories.length === 0) {
            try {
              await fetchAllCategories();
            } catch (_) {}
          }
          const catWithFolder = (allCategories || []).find(
            (c) =>
              c.drive_folder_id && String(c.drive_folder_id).trim().length > 0,
          );
          if (!catWithFolder) {
            hideTypingIndicator();
            setStatus(
              "Nenhuma categoria com pasta Drive configurada. Peça ao admin para definir o ID da pasta em Categorias.",
              "error",
            );
            renderMessage({
              role: "assistant",
              content:
                "❌ **Não há pasta Drive configurada**\n\nPara enviar arquivos, um administrador precisa cadastrar uma categoria com o ID da pasta do Google Drive em **Categorias**.",
            });
            return;
          }

          const formData = new FormData();
          formData.append("file", file);
          formData.append("drive_folder_id", catWithFolder.drive_folder_id);
          formData.append("category_id", String(catWithFolder.id));
          formData.append("category_code", catWithFolder.code || "");

          if (currentSessionId) {
            formData.append("session_id", currentSessionId);
            formData.append("sessionId", currentSessionId);
          }

          const uploadUrlWithParam = currentSessionId
            ? `${UPLOAD_URL}?sessionId=${currentSessionId}`
            : UPLOAD_URL;

          const response = await fetch(uploadUrlWithParam, {
            method: "POST",
            body: formData,
            signal: uploadAbortController.signal,
          });

          if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Upload failed");

          const text = await response.text();
          let result = {};
          try {
            if (text && text.trim().length > 0) result = JSON.parse(text);
          } catch (e) {}

          hideTypingIndicator();

          setStatus(`${file.name} processado com sucesso!`, "success");

          renderMessage({
            role: "assistant",
            content: `✅ **Arquivo Recebido**\n\nO documento "${file.name}" foi processado. Você pode fazer perguntas sobre ele agora.`,
          });
        } catch (error) {
          if (error.name === "AbortError") {
          } else {
            hideTypingIndicator();
            setStatus(`Erro ao processar ${file.name}`, "error");

            renderMessage({
              role: "assistant",
              content: `❌ **Falha no envio**\n\nNão foi possível processar o arquivo "${file.name}". Tente novamente.`,
            });
          }
        } finally {
          isLoading = false;
          uploadAbortController = null;
          setLoading(false); // Restaura botão send
          e.target.value = "";
        }
      });

      function buildMultiSelect({
        triggerId,
        dropdownId,
        searchId,
        optionsId,
        items,
        selected,
        allLabel,
        allValue,
        onToggle,
        renderLabel,
      }) {
        const trigger = document.getElementById(triggerId);
        const dropdown = document.getElementById(dropdownId);
        const search = document.getElementById(searchId);
        const container = document.getElementById(optionsId);
        if (!trigger || !dropdown || !search || !container) return null;

        function render(filter) {
          const q = (filter || "").toLowerCase();
          container.innerHTML = "";
          const allDiv = document.createElement("div");
          allDiv.className = "ms-option ms-all";
          const allCb = document.createElement("input");
          allCb.type = "checkbox";
          allCb.checked = selected.includes(allValue);
          allDiv.appendChild(allCb);
          allDiv.appendChild(document.createTextNode(allLabel));
          allDiv.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            if (selected.includes(allValue)) {
              selected.length = 0;
            } else {
              selected.length = 0;
              selected.push(allValue);
            }
            render(search.value);
            updateTrigger();
            if (onToggle) onToggle();
          });
          container.appendChild(allDiv);

          const filtered = q
            ? items.filter((i) => renderLabel(i).toLowerCase().includes(q))
            : items;
          filtered.forEach((item) => {
            const lbl = renderLabel(item);
            const val = lbl;
            const div = document.createElement("div");
            div.className = "ms-option";
            const cb = document.createElement("input");
            cb.type = "checkbox";
            cb.checked = selected.includes(allValue) || selected.includes(val);
            div.appendChild(cb);
            div.appendChild(document.createTextNode(lbl));
            div.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
              e.stopPropagation();
              if (selected.includes(allValue)) {
                selected.length = 0;
                items.forEach((it) => {
                  const v = renderLabel(it);
                  if (v !== val) selected.push(v);
                });
              } else if (selected.includes(val)) {
                selected.splice(selected.indexOf(val), 1);
              } else {
                selected.push(val);
              }
              render(search.value);
              updateTrigger();
              if (onToggle) onToggle();
            });
            container.appendChild(div);
          });
        }

        function updateTrigger() {
          let tagsContainer = trigger.querySelector(".ms-tags");
          if (!tagsContainer) {
            tagsContainer = document.createElement("span");
            tagsContainer.className = "ms-tags";
          }
          tagsContainer.innerHTML = "";
          const placeholder = trigger.querySelector(".ms-placeholder");
          if (selected.length === 0) {
            if (placeholder) placeholder.style.display = "";
            tagsContainer.remove();
            return;
          }
          if (placeholder) placeholder.style.display = "none";
          if (selected.includes(allValue)) {
            const tag = document.createElement("span");
            tag.className = "ms-tag";
            tag.textContent = allLabel;
            tagsContainer.appendChild(tag);
          } else if (selected.length <= 3) {
            selected.forEach((v) => {
              const tag = document.createElement("span");
              tag.className = "ms-tag";
              tag.textContent = v;
              tagsContainer.appendChild(tag);
            });
          } else {
            const tag = document.createElement("span");
            tag.className = "ms-tag";
            tag.textContent = selected.length + " selecionados";
            tagsContainer.appendChild(tag);
          }
          trigger.insertBefore(
            tagsContainer,
            trigger.querySelector(".ms-arrow"),
          );
        }

        trigger.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          e.preventDefault();
          const isOpen = dropdown.classList.contains("open");
          document
            .querySelectorAll(".ms-dropdown.open")
            .forEach((d) => d.classList.remove("open"));
          if (!isOpen) {
            dropdown.classList.add("open");
            search.value = "";
            render("");
            search.focus();
          }
        });
        search.addEventListener("input", () => render(search.value));
        document.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (!trigger.contains(e.target) && !dropdown.contains(e.target))
            dropdown.classList.remove("open");
        });
        return {
          render,
          updateTrigger,
          setItems(newItems) {
            items.length = 0;
            items.push(...newItems);
          },
        };
      }

      function getSelectedTeamIds() {
        // buildMultiSelect stores either the special allValue or the rendered
        // label. We resolve back to UUIDs by matching on name.
        if (selectedTeams.includes("__ALL__")) {
          return allTeams.map((t) => t.id);
        }
        return selectedTeams
          .map((label) => {
            const name = label.split(" â€” ")[0];
            const t = allTeams.find((x) => x.name === name);
            return t ? t.id : null;
          })
          .filter(Boolean);
      }

      // ===== Persistência da tela ativa (sobrevive ao reload) =====
      const ACTIVE_VIEW_KEY = "zanaflex_active_view";
      function saveActiveView(view) {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(ACTIVE_VIEW_KEY, view);
        } catch (_) {}
      }
      function restoreActiveView(view) {
        if (view === undefined) {
          try {
            view = localStorage.getItem(ACTIVE_VIEW_KEY);
          } catch (_) {
            view = null;
          }
        }
        if (!view || view === "chat") return;
        const cfg = window.AUTH_CONFIG;
        const role =
          typeof window.getCurrentUserRole === "function"
            ? window.getCurrentUserRole()
            : null;
        // Todas as telas persistidas são admin-only
        if (!cfg || role !== cfg.ADMIN_ROLE) return;
        const map = {
          ragDocs: { fn: showRagDocsPage, id: "ragDocsPage" },
          users: { fn: showUsersPage, id: "usersPage" },
          categories: { fn: showCategoriesPage, id: "categoriesAdminPage" },
          teams: { fn: showTeamsPage, id: "teamsAdminPage" },
        };
        const entry = map[view];
        if (!entry) return;
        const pageEl = document.getElementById(entry.id);
        if (pageEl && pageEl.style.display === "flex") {
          // Já visível — só garante que o chat fique oculto e o estado salvo
          document.getElementById("chatArea").style.display = "none";
          saveActiveView(view);
          return;
        }
        entry.fn();
      }
      window.restoreActiveView = restoreActiveView;
      window.getSavedActiveView = function () {
        try {
          return localStorage.getItem(ACTIVE_VIEW_KEY);
        } catch (_) {
          return null;
        }
      };

      function resolveTeamFormMemberIds() {
        if (teamFormSelectedMembers.includes("__ALL_MEMBERS__")) {
          return allUsers.map((u) => u.user_id);
        }
        return teamFormSelectedMembers
          .map((label) => {
            const u = allUsers.find(
              (x) => (x.full_name || x.email) + " (" + x.email + ")" === label,
            );
            return u ? u.user_id : null;
          })
          .filter(Boolean);
      }
      function resolveTeamFormCategoryIds() {
        if (teamFormSelectedCats.includes("__ALL_CATS__")) {
          return allCategories.map((c) => c.id);
        }
        return teamFormSelectedCats
          .map((label) => {
            const c = allCategories.find(
              (x) => x.code + " — " + x.name === label,
            );
            return c ? c.id : null;
          })
          .filter(Boolean);

      // Busca e filtros da lista de documentos

      async function loadRagDocs() {
        const loading = document.getElementById("ragDocsLoading");
        const table = document.getElementById("ragDocsTable");
        const empty = document.getElementById("ragDocsEmpty");
        const tbody = document.getElementById("ragDocsTableBody");
        const countEl = document.getElementById("ragDocsCount");
        if (loading) loading.style.display = "block";
        if (table) table.style.display = "none";
        if (empty) empty.style.display = "none";
        try {
          const resp = await fetch(RAG_DOCS_LIST_URL);
          if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("Falha ao listar documentos");
          const text = await resp.text();
          let docs = [];
          try {
            let parsed = text && text.trim().length > 0 ? JSON.parse(text) : [];
            // Defensivo: se vier double-encoded (string JSON dentro de string), refaz o parse.
            for (let i = 0; i < 3 && typeof parsed === "string"; i++) {
              try {
                parsed = JSON.parse(parsed);
              } catch (_) {
                break;
              }
            }
            console.log("[ragDocs] parsed response:", parsed);
            // Webhook n8n pode devolver vários formatos:
            //   [{ docs: [...] }]        (respondWith: allIncomingItems)
            //   { docs: [...] }          (respondWith: json)
            //   [ {id,title,...}, ... ]  (array direto)
            //   [{ json: { docs:[...] }}] (raw items)
            // Estratégia: procura recursivamente um array cujos itens tenham `id` ou `title`.
            const looksLikeDoc = (o) =>
              o &&
              typeof o === "object" &&
              !Array.isArray(o) &&
              ("id" in o || "title" in o || "file_id" in o);
            const findDocsArray = (v, depth = 0) => {
              if (depth > 6 || v == null) return null;
              if (Array.isArray(v)) {
                // Array vazio também é válido (sem docs).
                if (v.length === 0) return v;
                if (v.every(looksLikeDoc)) return v;
                // Caso contrário, mergulha em cada item.
                for (const item of v) {
                  const found = findDocsArray(item, depth + 1);
                  if (found) return found;
                }
                return null;
              }
              if (typeof v === "object") {
                // Chaves prioritárias
                for (const key of [
                  "docs",
                  "data",
                  "json",
                  "body",
                  "result",
                  "items",
                ]) {
                  if (key in v) {
                    const found = findDocsArray(v[key], depth + 1);
                    if (found) return found;
                  }
                }
                // Fallback: varre todas as chaves
                for (const key of Object.keys(v)) {
                  const found = findDocsArray(v[key], depth + 1);
                  if (found) return found;
                }
              }
              return null;
            };
            docs = findDocsArray(parsed) || [];
            console.log("[ragDocs] extracted docs:", docs.length, docs);
          } catch (e) {
            console.error("[ragDocs] parse error", e);
            docs = [];
          }
          // Filtra só docs globais (sem session_id) — anexos de chat não aparecem aqui.
          docs = docs.filter(
            (d) =>
              !d.session_id || d.session_id === "" || d.session_id === null,
          );
          ragAllDocs = docs;
          if (!ragTeamsFetched) {
            ragTeamsFetched = true;
            if (allTeams.length === 0) await fetchAllTeams();
          }
          populateRagDocFilters();
          renderRagDocs();
        } catch (err) {
          setStatus("Erro ao carregar documentos do RAG", "error");
          if (empty) {
            empty.style.display = "block";
            empty.innerHTML =
              '<div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px">⚠️</div>Falha ao carregar documentos.<br>Verifique se o endpoint <code>/zanaflex-rag-docs</code> está ativo no n8n.';
          }
        } finally {
          if (loading) loading.style.display = "none";
        }
      }

      function ragDocCatKey(doc) {
        return String(
          doc.category_id ||
            doc.category_code ||
            doc.category_name ||
            "__uncat__",
        );
      }

      function ragDocsHasActiveFilters() {
        return (
          (ragDocsFilters.search || "").trim() !== "" ||
          ragDocsFilters.category !== "__all__" ||
          ragDocsFilters.team !== "__all__"
        );
      }

      function getRagFilteredDocs() {
        let docs = ragAllDocs;
        const q = (ragDocsFilters.search || "").trim().toLowerCase();
        if (q) {
          docs = docs.filter((d) =>
            String(d.title || d.id || "")
              .toLowerCase()
              .includes(q),
          );
        }
        if (ragDocsFilters.category !== "__all__") {
          docs = docs.filter(
            (d) => ragDocCatKey(d) === ragDocsFilters.category,
          );
        }
        if (ragDocsFilters.team !== "__all__") {
          const team = allTeams.find(
            (t) => String(t.id) === ragDocsFilters.team,
          );
          const catIds = new Set(
            ((team && team.category_ids) || []).map(String),
          );
          docs = docs.filter(
            (d) => d.category_id && catIds.has(String(d.category_id)),
          );
        }
        return docs;
      }

      function populateRagDocFilters() {
        const catSel = document.getElementById("ragDocsCategoryFilter");
        if (catSel) {
          const prev = ragDocsFilters.category;
          const cats = new Map();
          ragAllDocs.forEach((d) => {
            const key = ragDocCatKey(d);
            const label =
              d.category_name || d.category_code || "Sem categoria";
            if (!cats.has(key)) cats.set(key, label);
          });
          const opts = ['<option value="__all__">Todas as categorias</option>'];
          Array.from(cats.entries())
            .sort((a, b) => a[1].localeCompare(b[1], "pt-BR"))
            .forEach(([k, l]) =>
              opts.push(
                `<option value="${escapeHtml(k)}">${escapeHtml(l)}</option>`,
              ),
            );
          catSel.innerHTML = opts.join("");
          catSel.value =
            prev === "__all__" || cats.has(prev) ? prev : "__all__";
          ragDocsFilters.category = catSel.value;
        }
        const teamSel = document.getElementById("ragDocsTeamFilter");
        if (teamSel) {
          if (allTeams.length === 0) {
            // Sem equipes visíveis (usuário não-admin ou nenhuma cadastrada)
            teamSel.style.display = "none";
            ragDocsFilters.team = "__all__";
          } else {
            teamSel.style.display = "";
            const prev = ragDocsFilters.team;
            const opts = ['<option value="__all__">Todas as equipes</option>'];
            allTeams
              .slice()
              .sort((a, b) =>
                String(a.name).localeCompare(String(b.name), "pt-BR"),
              )
              .forEach((t) =>
                opts.push(
                  `<option value="${escapeHtml(String(t.id))}">${escapeHtml(t.name)}</option>`,
                ),
              );
            teamSel.innerHTML = opts.join("");
            teamSel.value = allTeams.some((t) => String(t.id) === prev)
              ? prev
              : "__all__";
            ragDocsFilters.team = teamSel.value;
          }
        }
        updateRagClearFiltersBtn();
      }

      function updateRagClearFiltersBtn() {
        const btn = document.getElementById("ragDocsClearFiltersBtn");
        if (btn)
          btn.style.display = ragDocsHasActiveFilters() ? "inline-flex" : "none";
      }

      function renderRagDocs() {
        const table = document.getElementById("ragDocsTable");
        const empty = document.getElementById("ragDocsEmpty");
        const tbody = document.getElementById("ragDocsTableBody");
        const countEl = document.getElementById("ragDocsCount");
        if (!tbody) return;
        const docs = getRagFilteredDocs();
        const hasFilters = ragDocsHasActiveFilters();
        updateRagClearFiltersBtn();
        if (countEl) {
          countEl.textContent = hasFilters
            ? "(" + docs.length + " de " + ragAllDocs.length + ")"
            : "(" + ragAllDocs.length + ")";
          }
          tbody.innerHTML = "";
          if (empty) empty.style.display = "none";
          if (table) table.style.display = "none";
          if (docs.length === 0) {
            if (empty) {
              empty.innerHTML = hasFilters
                ? '<div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px">🔍</div>Nenhum documento corresponde à busca/filtros.'
                : '<div style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px">📁</div>Nenhum documento na base de conhecimento.<br />Clique em <strong>Adicionar Documento</strong> para começar.';
              empty.style.display = "block";
            }
            updateRagBulkBar();
            return;
          }
          // Agrupa por categoria
          const groups = new Map();
          docs.forEach((doc) => {
            const key =
              doc.category_id ||
              doc.category_code ||
              doc.category_name ||
              "__uncat__";
            const label =
              doc.category_name || doc.category_code || "Sem categoria";
            if (!groups.has(key)) {
              groups.set(key, { key, label, docs: [] });
            }
            groups.get(key).docs.push(doc);
          });
          // Ordena grupos por rótulo, "Sem categoria" por último
          const groupList = Array.from(groups.values()).sort((a, b) => {
            if (a.key === "__uncat__") return 1;
            if (b.key === "__uncat__") return -1;
            return a.label.localeCompare(b.label, "pt-BR");
          });
          groupList.forEach((g) => {
            const safeKey = String(g.key).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "_");
            const collapsed = ragCollapsedCats.has(g.key);
            const headerTr = document.createElement("tr");
            headerTr.className = "rag-cat-header";
            headerTr.dataset.catKey = g.key;
            headerTr.style.cursor = "pointer";
            headerTr.style.background = "var(--bg-secondary, rgba(0,0,0,0.04))";
            headerTr.innerHTML = `
              <td class="users-th" colspan="6" style="font-weight:600;user-select:none">
                <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
                  <i data-lucide="${collapsed ? "chevron-right" : "chevron-down"}" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i>
                  <i data-lucide="folder" style="width:14px;height:14px;opacity:0.7"></i>
                  ${escapeHtml(g.label)}
                  <span style="opacity:0.6;font-weight:400;font-size:0.85rem">(${g.docs.length})</span>
                </span>
              </td>
            `;
            tbody.appendChild(headerTr);
            g.docs.forEach((doc) => {
              const tr = document.createElement("tr");
              tr.className = "rag-cat-row rag-cat-row-" + safeKey;
              tr.dataset.catKey = g.key;
              if (collapsed) tr.style.display = "none";
              const title = doc.title || doc.id || "Sem título";
              const lastIdx = doc.last_indexed_at || doc.created_at;
              const catTxt =
                doc.category_name ||
                doc.category_code ||
                '<span style="opacity:0.4">—</span>';
              tr.innerHTML = `
                <td class="users-th" style="text-align:center;padding-left:32px">
                  <input
                    type="checkbox"
                    class="rag-doc-check"
                    data-rag-doc-id="${escapeHtml(doc.id)}"
                  />
                </td>
                <td class="users-th" style="font-weight:500">
                  ${
                    doc.url
                      ? `<a href="${escapeHtml(doc.url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color:var(--text-primary);text-decoration:none">${escapeHtml(title)}</a>`
                      : escapeHtml(title)
                  }
                </td>
                <td class="users-th" style="font-size:0.85rem">${escapeHtml(catTxt)}</td>
                <td class="users-th">${ragSourceBadge(doc)}</td>
                <td class="users-th">${formatRagDate(lastIdx)}</td>
                <td class="users-th" style="text-align:right;white-space:nowrap">
                  <button
                    class="btn-modal rag-reindex-btn"
                    data-rag-reindex-id="${escapeHtml(doc.id)}"
                    data-rag-reindex-title="${escapeHtml(title)}"
                    style="background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px;margin-right:6px"
                    title="Reprocessar este documento"
                  >
                    <i data-lucide="refresh-cw" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i>
                    Reprocessar
                  </button>
                  <button
                    class="btn-modal btn-cancel rag-delete-btn"
                    data-rag-doc-id="${escapeHtml(doc.id)}"
                    data-rag-doc-title="${escapeHtml(title)}"
                    style="background:#dc2626;color:#fff;border:none;padding:6px 12px;font-size:12px"
                    title="Remover documento do RAG"
                  >
                    <i data-lucide="trash-2" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i>
                    Remover
                  </button>
                </td>
              `;
              tbody.appendChild(tr);
            });
          });
          if (table) table.style.display = "table";
          lucide.createIcons();
          tbody.querySelectorAll("tr.rag-cat-header").forEach((row) => {
            row.addEventListener("click", () => {
              const key = row.dataset.catKey;
              const isCollapsed = ragCollapsedCats.has(key);
              if (isCollapsed) ragCollapsedCats.delete(key);
              else ragCollapsedCats.add(key);
              tbody
                .querySelectorAll(
                  `tr.rag-cat-row[data-cat-key="${CSS.escape(key)}"]`,
                )
                .forEach((r) => {
                  r.style.display = isCollapsed ? "" : "none";
                });
              const icon = row.querySelector("i[data-lucide], svg");
              if (icon) {
                const newName = isCollapsed ? "chevron-down" : "chevron-right";
                const replacement = document.createElement("i");
                replacement.setAttribute("data-lucide", newName);
                replacement.style.width = "16px";
                replacement.style.height = "16px";
                icon.replaceWith(replacement);
                lucide.createIcons();
              }
            });
          });
          tbody.querySelectorAll("button.rag-delete-btn").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.addEventListener("click", (ev) => {
              ev.stopPropagation();
              confirmDeleteRagDoc(
                btn.dataset.ragDocId,
                btn.dataset.ragDocTitle,
              );
            });
          });
          tbody.querySelectorAll("button.rag-reindex-btn").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.addEventListener("click", (ev) => {
              ev.stopPropagation();
              reindexRagDocs(
                [btn.dataset.ragReindexId],
                btn.dataset.ragReindexTitle,
              );
            });
          });
          tbody.querySelectorAll("input.rag-doc-check").forEach((cb) => {
            cb.addEventListener("click", (ev) => ev.stopPropagation());
            cb.addEventListener("change", updateRagBulkBar);
          });
          const selectAll = document.getElementById("ragDocsSelectAll");
          if (selectAll) {
            selectAll.checked = false;
            selectAll.onchange = () => {
              tbody.querySelectorAll("input.rag-doc-check").forEach((cb) => {
                if (cb.closest("tr").style.display !== "none") {
                  cb.checked = selectAll.checked;
                }
              });
              updateRagBulkBar();
            };
          }
          updateRagBulkBar();
      }

      async function confirmDeleteRagDoc(fileId, title) {
        if (!fileId) return;
        const ok = window.confirm(
          `Remover o documento "${title}" da base de conhecimento?\n\nIsso vai apagar:\n• O arquivo no Google Drive\n• Os vetores no Supabase\n• Os metadados e linhas (CSV/Excel)\n\nEsta ação é IRREVERSÍVEL.`,
        );
        if (!ok) return;
        try {
          showRagBusy(`Removendo "${title}"... apagando do Drive e do vetor.`);
          setStatus(`Removendo "${title}"...`, "warning");
          const resp = await fetch(RAG_DOCS_DELETE_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({ file_id: fileId }),
          });
          if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("Delete failed");
          setStatus(`Documento "${title}" removido.`, "success");
          await loadRagDocs();
        } catch (err) {
          setStatus("Erro ao remover documento.", "error");
        } finally {
          hideRagBusy();
        }
      }

      function updateRagBulkBar() {
        const bar = document.getElementById("ragDocsBulkBar");
        const countEl = document.getElementById("ragDocsBulkCount");
        const selectedBtn = document.getElementById("ragReindexSelectedBtn");
        if (!bar) return;
        const checks = document.querySelectorAll(
          "#ragDocsTableBody input.rag-doc-check:checked",
        );
        const n = checks.length;
        if (countEl) countEl.textContent = n + " selecionado(s)";
        if (selectedBtn) selectedBtn.disabled = n === 0;
        bar.style.display = n > 0 ? "flex" : "none";
      }

      async function reindexRagDocs(fileIds, displayName) {
        if (!fileIds || fileIds.length === 0) return;
        const label =
          fileIds.length === 1
            ? `"${displayName || fileIds[0]}"`
            : `${fileIds.length} documentos`;
        const ok = window.confirm(
          `Reprocessar ${label}?\n\nO arquivo continuará no Drive. O conteúdo será re-extraído e re-indexado no vetor (substituindo a versão anterior).`,
        );
        if (!ok) return;
        try {
          showRagBusy(
            `Reprocessando ${label}... isso pode demorar alguns minutos.`,
          );
          setStatus(`Reprocessando ${label}...`, "warning");
          const resp = await fetch(RAG_REINDEX_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({ file_ids: fileIds }),
          });
          if (!resp.ok) {
            const txt = await resp.text().catch(() => "");
            throw new Error(txt || "reindex failed");
          }
          setStatus(
            `Reprocessamento de ${label} enfileirado. A página recarregará em instantes.`,
            "success",
          );
          // O backend responde "queued"; o processo continua em background.
          // Aguarda um pouco e recarrega para refletir last_indexed_at atualizado.
          setTimeout(() => loadRagDocs(), 4000);
        } catch (err) {
          setStatus(`Erro ao reprocessar: ${err.message || err}`, "error");
        } finally {
          hideRagBusy();
        }
      }

      // Read a File into a base64 string (without the `data:...;base64,` prefix).
      function fileToBase64(file) {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
          const reader = new FileReader();
          reader.onload = () => {
            const result = reader.result || "";
            // strip data URL prefix if present
            const comma = String(result).indexOf(",");
            resolve(
              comma >= 0 ? String(result).slice(comma + 1) : String(result),
            );
          };
          reader.onerror = reject;
          reader.readAsDataURL(file);
        });
      }

      // Slugify the filename (without extension) for use as both file_id and code.
      function slugifyFilename(name) {
        const base = String(name).replace(/\.[^.]+$/, "");
        return base
          .normalize("NFD")
          .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")
          .replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/g, "-")
          .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "")
          .toLowerCase()
          .slice(0, 96);
      }

      // ===== Fila de upload multi-arquivo =====
      const uploadQueue = {
        items: [], // [{file, category, status: pending|uploading|done|error, error}]
        uploading: false,
        finished: false,
      };

      function ragUsableCategories() {
        return (allCategories || []).filter(
          (c) =>
            c.drive_folder_id && String(c.drive_folder_id).trim().length > 0,
        );
      }

      function ragCategoryOptionsHtml(selected) {
        return ragUsableCategories()
          .map(
            (c) =>
              `<option value="${escapeHtml(c.code)}"${
                c.code === selected ? " selected" : ""
              }>${escapeHtml(c.name ? c.code + " — " + c.name : c.code)}</option>`,
          )
          .join("");
      }

      function fmtFileSize(bytes) {
        if (bytes == null) return "";
        const u = ["B", "KB", "MB", "GB"];
        let i = 0,
          v = bytes;
        while (v >= 1024 && i < u.length - 1) {
          v /= 1024;
          i++;
        }
        return v.toFixed(v >= 10 || i === 0 ? 0 : 1) + " " + u[i];
      }

      function renderUploadQueue() {
        const list = document.getElementById("uploadQueueList");
        const progress = document.getElementById("uploadQueueProgress");
        const confirmBtn = document.getElementById("uploadDocConfirmBtn");
        const cancelBtn = document.getElementById("uploadDocCancelBtn");
        const applyAllBtn = document.getElementById("uploadDocApplyAllBtn");
        const addMoreBtn = document.getElementById("uploadDocAddMoreBtn");
        const allSel = document.getElementById("uploadDocCategoryAll");
        if (!list) return;
        const items = uploadQueue.items;
        const busy = uploadQueue.uploading;

        list.innerHTML = items
          .map((it, i) => {
            let statusHtml;
            if (it.status === "uploading") {
              statusHtml =
                '<div style="width:16px;height:16px;border:2px solid var(--color-primary);border-top-color:transparent;border-radius:50%;animation:ragSpin 1s linear infinite;flex-shrink:0" title="Enviando..."></div>';
            } else if (it.status === "done") {
              statusHtml =
                '<i data-lucide="check-circle-2" style="width:18px;height:18px;color:#16a34a;flex-shrink:0"></i>';
            } else if (it.status === "error") {
              statusHtml =
                '<i data-lucide="alert-circle" style="width:18px;height:18px;color:#dc2626;flex-shrink:0"></i>';
            } else {
              statusHtml = busy
                ? '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);flex-shrink:0">na fila</span>'
                : `<button type="button" class="upload-q-remove" data-idx="${i}" title="Remover da fila" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);padding:4px;flex-shrink:0"><i data-lucide="x" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i></button>`;
            }
            const catDisabled =
              busy || it.status === "done" || it.status === "uploading";
            return `
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg-chat)">
                <i data-lucide="file-text" style="width:18px;height:18px;color:var(--text-secondary);flex-shrink:0"></i>
                <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
                  <div style="font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-primary);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap" title="${escapeHtml(it.file.name)}">${escapeHtml(it.file.name)}</div>
                  <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-secondary)">${fmtFileSize(it.file.size)}</div>
                  ${
                    it.status === "error" && it.error
                      ? `<div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:#dc2626;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap" title="${escapeHtml(it.error)}">${escapeHtml(it.error)}</div>`
                      : ""
                  }
                </div>
                <select class="upload-q-cat" data-idx="${i}" ${catDisabled ? "disabled" : ""} style="max-width:200px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input,#1f1f1f);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);font-size:0.8rem">
                  ${ragCategoryOptionsHtml(it.category)}
                </select>
                ${statusHtml}
              </div>`;
          })
          .join("");

        const doneN = items.filter((it) => it.status === "done").length;
        const errN = items.filter((it) => it.status === "error").length;
        const pendN = items.filter((it) => it.status === "pending").length;
        if (progress) {
          if (busy) {
            progress.textContent = `Enviando ${doneN + errN + 1} de ${items.length}...`;
          } else if (uploadQueue.finished) {
            progress.textContent =
              errN > 0
                ? `Concluído: ${doneN} ok, ${errN} erro(s)`
                : `Concluído: ${doneN} documento(s) indexado(s)`;
          } else {
            progress.textContent = items.length + " arquivo(s) na fila";
          }
        }

        if (confirmBtn) {
          if (busy) {
            confirmBtn.disabled = true;
            confirmBtn.textContent = "Enviando...";
          } else if (errN > 0) {
            confirmBtn.disabled = false;
            confirmBtn.textContent = `Tentar novamente (${errN})`;
          } else if (uploadQueue.finished || items.length === 0) {
            confirmBtn.disabled = items.length === 0 && !uploadQueue.finished;
            confirmBtn.textContent = "Fechar";
          } else {
            confirmBtn.disabled = pendN === 0;
            confirmBtn.textContent = `Enviar todos (${pendN})`;
          }
        }
        if (cancelBtn) {
          cancelBtn.disabled = busy;
          cancelBtn.style.display = uploadQueue.finished ? "none" : "";
        }
        if (applyAllBtn) applyAllBtn.disabled = busy;
        if (addMoreBtn) addMoreBtn.disabled = busy;
        if (allSel) allSel.disabled = busy;
        lucide.createIcons();
      }

      async function openUploadQueueModal(files) {
        try {
          if (allCategories.length === 0) await fetchAllCategories();
        } catch (_) {}
        const usable = ragUsableCategories();
        if (usable.length === 0) {
          setStatus(
            "Nenhuma categoria com pasta Drive configurada. Cadastre em Categorias.",
            "error",
          );
          return;
        }
        const modal = document.getElementById("uploadDocModal");
        const errEl = document.getElementById("uploadDocModalError");
        const allSel = document.getElementById("uploadDocCategoryAll");
        const defCat = (usable.find((c) => c.code === "IT") || usable[0]).code;

        // Se a fila anterior já terminou, começa limpa
        if (uploadQueue.finished && !uploadQueue.uploading) {
          uploadQueue.items = [];
          uploadQueue.finished = false;
        }

        (files || []).forEach((f) => {
          const dup = uploadQueue.items.some(
            (it) => it.file.name === f.name && it.file.size === f.size,
          );
          if (!dup)
            uploadQueue.items.push({
              file: f,
              category: allSel && allSel.value ? allSel.value : defCat,
              status: "pending",
              error: null,
            });
        });

        if (allSel && !allSel.options.length) {
          allSel.innerHTML = ragCategoryOptionsHtml(defCat);
        } else if (allSel) {
          const cur = allSel.value;
          allSel.innerHTML = ragCategoryOptionsHtml(cur || defCat);
        }
        if (errEl) {
          errEl.style.display = "none";
          errEl.textContent = "";
        }
        modal.style.display = "flex";
        renderUploadQueue();
      }

      function closeUploadQueueModal() {
        if (uploadQueue.uploading) return;
        const modal = document.getElementById("uploadDocModal");
        if (modal) modal.style.display = "none";
        uploadQueue.items = [];
        uploadQueue.finished = false;
      }

      async function uploadSingleRagFile(file, categoryCode) {
        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append("data", file);
        formData.append("categoria", categoryCode);
        const resp = await fetch(RAG_UPLOAD_URL, {
          method: "POST",
          body: formData,
        });
        if (!resp.ok) {
          const txt = await resp.text().catch(() => "");
          throw new Error(txt || "HTTP " + resp.status);
        }
        try {
          return await resp.json();
        } catch (_) {
          return null;
        }
      }

      async function startUploadQueue() {
        if (uploadQueue.uploading) return;
        const todo = uploadQueue.items.filter(
          (it) => it.status === "pending" || it.status === "error",
        );
        if (todo.length === 0) return;
        uploadQueue.uploading = true;
        uploadQueue.finished = false;
        renderUploadQueue();
        for (const item of todo) {
          item.status = "uploading";
          item.error = null;
          renderUploadQueue();
          try {
            await uploadSingleRagFile(item.file, item.category);
            item.status = "done";
          } catch (e) {
            item.status = "error";
            item.error = e.message || String(e);
          }
          renderUploadQueue();
        }
        uploadQueue.uploading = false;
        uploadQueue.finished = true;
        renderUploadQueue();
        const errN = uploadQueue.items.filter(
          (it) => it.status === "error",
        ).length;
        const doneN = uploadQueue.items.filter(
          (it) => it.status === "done",
        ).length;
        setStatus(
          errN > 0
            ? `Fila concluída: ${doneN} indexado(s), ${errN} erro(s).`
            : `${doneN} documento(s) indexado(s) no RAG!`,
          errN > 0 ? "error" : "success",
        );
        await loadRagDocs();
      }

      // Eventos da fila (registrados uma vez)
      (function wireUploadQueueModal() {
        const modal = document.getElementById("uploadDocModal");
        const list = document.getElementById("uploadQueueList");
        const cancelBtn = document.getElementById("uploadDocCancelBtn");
        const confirmBtn = document.getElementById("uploadDocConfirmBtn");
        const applyAllBtn = document.getElementById("uploadDocApplyAllBtn");
        const addMoreBtn = document.getElementById("uploadDocAddMoreBtn");
        const allSel = document.getElementById("uploadDocCategoryAll");
        if (!modal || !list) return;
        list.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
          if (e.target.classList.contains("upload-q-cat")) {
            const it = uploadQueue.items[+e.target.dataset.idx];
            if (it) it.category = e.target.value;
          }
        });
        list.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          const btn = e.target.closest(".upload-q-remove");
          if (btn && !uploadQueue.uploading) {
            uploadQueue.items.splice(+btn.dataset.idx, 1);
            renderUploadQueue();
          }
        });
        if (cancelBtn)
          cancelBtn.addEventListener("click", closeUploadQueueModal);
        if (confirmBtn)
          confirmBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const hasTodo = uploadQueue.items.some(
              (it) => it.status === "pending" || it.status === "error",
            );
            if (hasTodo) startUploadQueue();
            else closeUploadQueueModal();
          });
        if (applyAllBtn && allSel)
          applyAllBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const code = allSel.value;
            if (!code) return;
            uploadQueue.items.forEach((it) => {
              if (it.status === "pending" || it.status === "error")
                it.category = code;
            });
            renderUploadQueue();
          });
        if (addMoreBtn)
          addMoreBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const input = document.getElementById("ragDocFileInput");
            if (input) input.click();
          });
        modal.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === modal) closeUploadQueueModal();
        });
        document.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
          if (e.key === "Escape" && modal.style.display === "flex")
            closeUploadQueueModal();
        });
      })();

      // ===== Overlay de "trabalhando..." para operações longas do RAG =====
      function showRagBusy(message) {
        const overlay = document.getElementById("ragDocsBusyOverlay");
        const msg = document.getElementById("ragDocsBusyMessage");
        if (msg && message) msg.textContent = message;
        if (overlay) overlay.style.display = "flex";
        // Desabilita botões enquanto processa
        ["ragDocUploadBtn", "ragDocsRefreshBtn", "ragPurgeAllBtn"].forEach(
          (id) => {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if (el) el.disabled = true;
          },
        );
      }
      function hideRagBusy() {
        const overlay = document.getElementById("ragDocsBusyOverlay");
        if (overlay) overlay.style.display = "none";
        ["ragDocUploadBtn", "ragDocsRefreshBtn", "ragPurgeAllBtn"].forEach(
          (id) => {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            if (el) el.disabled = false;
          },
        );
      }

      const manageRagDocsBtn = document.getElementById("manageRagDocsBtn");
      if (manageRagDocsBtn) {
        manageRagDocsBtn.addEventListener("click", showRagDocsPage);
      }
      const ragDocsBackBtn = document.getElementById("ragDocsBackBtn");
      if (ragDocsBackBtn) {
        ragDocsBackBtn.addEventListener("click", hideRagDocsPage);
      }
      const ragDocsRefreshBtn = document.getElementById("ragDocsRefreshBtn");
      if (ragDocsRefreshBtn) {
        ragDocsRefreshBtn.addEventListener("click", loadRagDocs);
      }
      // ===== Modal de info da API de upload (admin) =====
      (function wireRagApiInfoModal() {
        const btn = document.getElementById("ragApiInfoBtn");
        const modal = document.getElementById("ragApiInfoModal");
        const closeBtn = document.getElementById("ragApiInfoCloseBtn");
        if (!btn || !modal) return;
        const endpointEl = document.getElementById("ragApiInfoEndpoint");
        const curlEl = document.getElementById("ragApiInfoCurl");
        const jsEl = document.getElementById("ragApiInfoJs");
        const open = () => {
          if (endpointEl) endpointEl.textContent = "POST " + RAG_UPLOAD_URL;
          if (curlEl)
            curlEl.textContent = [
              "curl -X POST \\",
              '  "' + RAG_UPLOAD_URL + '" \\',
              '  -F "data=@/caminho/do/arquivo.pdf" \\',
              '  -F "categoria=IT" \\',
              "  --max-time 300",
            ].join("\n");
          if (jsEl)
            jsEl.textContent = [
              "// Envie UM arquivo por vez e aguarde a resposta",
              "async function enviarDocumento(file, categoria) {",
              "  const formData = new FormData();",
              '  formData.append("data", file); // File ou Blob',
              '  formData.append("categoria", categoria); // ex.: "IT"',
              "",
              '  const resp = await fetch("' + RAG_UPLOAD_URL + '", {',
              '    method: "POST",',
              "    body: formData,",
              "  });",
              "  if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(await resp.text());",
              '  return resp.json(); // { action: "insert" | "replace", ... }',
              "}",
              "",
              "// Para vários arquivos: sequencial, nunca em paralelo",
              "for (const file of meusArquivos) {",
              '  await enviarDocumento(file, "IT");',
              "}",
            ].join("\n");
          modal.style.display = "flex";
          lucide.createIcons();
        };
        const close = () => {
          modal.style.display = "none";
        };
        btn.addEventListener("click", open);
        if (closeBtn) closeBtn.addEventListener("click", close);
        modal.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === modal) close();
        });
        document.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
          if (e.key === "Escape" && modal.style.display === "flex") close();
        });
      })();
      const ragDocsSearchInput = document.getElementById("ragDocsSearchInput");
      if (ragDocsSearchInput) {
        ragDocsSearchInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
          ragDocsFilters.search = ragDocsSearchInput.value;
          renderRagDocs();
        });
      }
      const ragDocsCategoryFilter = document.getElementById(
        "ragDocsCategoryFilter",
      );
      if (ragDocsCategoryFilter) {
        ragDocsCategoryFilter.addEventListener("change", () => {
          ragDocsFilters.category = ragDocsCategoryFilter.value;
          renderRagDocs();
        });
      }
      const ragDocsTeamFilter = document.getElementById("ragDocsTeamFilter");
      if (ragDocsTeamFilter) {
        ragDocsTeamFilter.addEventListener("change", () => {
          ragDocsFilters.team = ragDocsTeamFilter.value;
          renderRagDocs();
        });
      }
      const ragDocsClearFiltersBtn = document.getElementById(
        "ragDocsClearFiltersBtn",
      );
      if (ragDocsClearFiltersBtn) {
        ragDocsClearFiltersBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
          ragDocsFilters.search = "";
          ragDocsFilters.category = "__all__";
          ragDocsFilters.team = "__all__";
          if (ragDocsSearchInput) ragDocsSearchInput.value = "";
          if (ragDocsCategoryFilter) ragDocsCategoryFilter.value = "__all__";
          if (ragDocsTeamFilter) ragDocsTeamFilter.value = "__all__";
          renderRagDocs();
        });
      }
      const ragDocUploadBtn = document.getElementById("ragDocUploadBtn");
      const ragDocFileInput = document.getElementById("ragDocFileInput");
      if (ragDocUploadBtn && ragDocFileInput) {
        ragDocUploadBtn.addEventListener("click", () =>
          ragDocFileInput.click(),
        );
        ragDocFileInput.addEventListener("change", async (e) => {
          const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
          if (files.length === 0) return;
          await openUploadQueueModal(files);
          ragDocFileInput.value = ""; // reset
        });
      }

      const ragReindexSelectedBtn = document.getElementById(
        "ragReindexSelectedBtn",
      );
      if (ragReindexSelectedBtn) {
        ragReindexSelectedBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
          const ids = Array.from(
            document.querySelectorAll(
              "#ragDocsTableBody input.rag-doc-check:checked",
            ),
          ).map((cb) => cb.dataset.ragDocId);
          if (ids.length === 0) return;
          reindexRagDocs(ids);
        });
      }
      const ragReindexAllBtn = document.getElementById("ragReindexAllBtn");
      if (ragReindexAllBtn) {
        ragReindexAllBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
          const ids = Array.from(
            document.querySelectorAll("#ragDocsTableBody input.rag-doc-check"),
          ).map((cb) => cb.dataset.ragDocId);
          if (ids.length === 0) return;
          reindexRagDocs(ids);
        });
      }

      async function purgeAllRagDocs() {
        const ok = window.confirm(
          "⚠️ ATENÇÃO\n\nIsso vai APAGAR TODOS os documentos permanentes do RAG (vetores + metadados).\n\nOs arquivos no Google Drive serão MANTIDOS por padrão.\n\nConfirma?",
        );
        if (!ok) return;
        const alsoDrive = window.confirm(
          "Apagar TAMBÉM os arquivos no Google Drive?\n\n• OK → apaga vetores + arquivos no Drive\n• Cancelar → apaga só os vetores (Drive permanece)",
        );
        try {
          showRagBusy(
            alsoDrive
              ? "Apagando TUDO (Drive + vetores)... pode demorar."
              : "Apagando vetores e metadados...",
          );
          setStatus("Apagando base de conhecimento...", "warning");
          const resp = await fetch(RAG_PURGE_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
            body: JSON.stringify({ deleteFromDrive: !!alsoDrive }),
          });
          if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("purge failed");
          const text = await resp.text();
          let payload = {};
          try {
            payload = text ? JSON.parse(text) : {};
          } catch (e) {}
          const count = payload.deleted_count ?? "?";
          setStatus(
            `Base limpa. ${count} documento(s) removido(s).`,
            "success",
          );
          await loadRagDocs();
        } catch (err) {
          setStatus("Erro ao apagar a base.", "error");
        } finally {
          hideRagBusy();
        }
      }

      const ragPurgeAllBtn = document.getElementById("ragPurgeAllBtn");
      if (ragPurgeAllBtn) {
        ragPurgeAllBtn.addEventListener("click", purgeAllRagDocs);
      }

      const userForm2 = document.getElementById("userForm2");
      if (userForm2) {
        userForm2.addEventListener("submit", async (e) => {
          e.preventDefault();
          const saveBtn = document.getElementById("formSaveBtn");
          const errorEl = document.getElementById("formError");
          errorEl.style.display = "none";
          saveBtn.disabled = true;
          try {
            const teamIds = getSelectedTeamIds();
            if (editingUserId) {
              const roleSelect = document.getElementById("formRole");
              const chosenRole = roleSelect.disabled
                ? currentUserRole
                : roleSelect.value;
              const { error } = await supabaseClient.rpc(USER_RPC.UPDATE, {
                p_user_id: editingUserId,
                p_full_name: document
                  .getElementById("formFullName")
                  .value.trim(),
                p_role: chosenRole,
              });
              if (error) throw error;
              const { error: teamsError } = await supabaseClient.rpc(
                ZANAFLEX_PREFIX + "admin_set_user_teams",
                { p_user_id: editingUserId, p_team_ids: teamIds },
              );
              if (teamsError) throw teamsError;
            } else {
              const email = document.getElementById("formEmail").value.trim();
              const password = document.getElementById("formPassword").value;
              const fullName = document
                .getElementById("formFullName")
                .value.trim();
              const role = document.getElementById("formRole").value;
              const { data: signupData, error: signupError } =
                await supabaseClient.auth.signUp({
                  email,
                  password,
                  options: {
                    data: {
                      full_name: fullName,
                      role,
                      company_name: "zanaflex",
                    },
                  },
                });
              if (signupError) throw signupError;
              if (signupData.user) {
                const { error: confirmError } = await supabaseClient.rpc(
                  USER_RPC.CONFIRM,
                  { p_user_id: signupData.user.id },
                );
                if (confirmError) {
                  /* warn suppressed */
                }
                if (teamIds.length > 0) {
                  const { error: teamsError } = await supabaseClient.rpc(
                    ZANAFLEX_PREFIX + "admin_set_user_teams",
                    { p_user_id: signupData.user.id, p_team_ids: teamIds },
                  );
                  if (teamsError) {
                    /* warn suppressed - user was created, just no teams */
                  }
                }
              }
            }
            document.getElementById("userFormPanel").style.display = "none";
            await loadUsersPage();
          } catch (err) {
            errorEl.textContent = err.message || "Erro ao salvar usuário.";
            errorEl.style.display = "block";
          } finally {
            saveBtn.disabled = false;
          }
        });
      }

      const deleteCancelBtn2 = document.getElementById("deleteCancelBtn");
      if (deleteCancelBtn2) {
        deleteCancelBtn2.addEventListener("click", () => {
          document.getElementById("deleteModal").style.display = "none";
        });
      }
      const deleteConfirmBtn2 = document.getElementById("deleteConfirmBtn");
      if (deleteConfirmBtn2) {
        deleteConfirmBtn2.addEventListener("click", async () => {
          const errorEl = document.getElementById("deleteModalError");
          errorEl.style.display = "none";
          deleteConfirmBtn2.disabled = true;
          try {
            const { error } = await supabaseClient.rpc(USER_RPC.DELETE, {
              p_user_id: deletingUserId,
            });
            if (error) throw error;
            document.getElementById("deleteModal").style.display = "none";
            await loadUsersPage();
          } catch (err) {
            errorEl.textContent = err.message || "Erro ao excluir usuário.";
            errorEl.style.display = "block";
          } finally {
            deleteConfirmBtn2.disabled = false;
          }
        });
      }

      window.loadUsers = loadUsersPage;
      window.showUsersPage = showUsersPage;
      window.showTeamsPage = showTeamsPage;
      window.showCategoriesPage = showCategoriesPage;

      document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
        lucide.createIcons();
      });
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
